deck: Rowena Luk, Dimagi's Chief Connector, on building a thriving partner ecosystem of local developers and implementers, and why opening up CommCare as infrastructure is how communities lift themselves out of poverty.
seo_description: Rowena Luk, Dimagi's Chief Connector, on building a local partner ecosystem around CommCare and subverting what she calls the hubris of aid.
og_description: Rowena Luk on building Dimagi's partner ecosystem and subverting the hubris of aid.

pull_quote.text: The hubris of aid is believing that we can help people better than they can help themselves. And that's not a mistake that we're making.
pull_quote.cite: Rowena Luk, Chief Connector at Dimagi

bullets: From engineering to global health: how a Canadian physician working in Ghana convinced Rowena that technology could change healthcare in Africa
The first female hire that stuck: joining a room full of MIT guys in 2009 and helping shape Dimagi's culture
Why she left and came back: a 12-year run, a sabbatical that launched the Aid Evolved podcast, and a passion for building Africa's tech ecosystem
CommCare as infrastructure: why an open-source platform built for others to build on is not in competition with local partners
Partners moving faster than Dimagi could: a Nigerian team deploying a COVID-19 app in 24 hours, and a cotton farmer using CommCare to manage Indonesia's cinnamon value chain
Subverting the hubris of aid: decolonizing aid, the design under the mango tree philosophy, and impact over revenue
Why now: how Dimagi's growth finally created the bandwidth to invest in long-term partnerships

stats.label: for a local partner in Nigeria to deploy a COVID-19 application on CommCare in 2020
of the world's cinnamon comes from Indonesia, where a partner uses CommCare to manage the value chain
Rowena spent at Dimagi before taking a sabbatical

guests.name: Rowena Luk
guests.role: Chief Connector at Dimagi and one of its earliest team members, leading the build-out of a local partner and technology ecosystem in Africa. Also creator of the Aid Evolved podcast.
